definitions: One of the paired anatomical appendages of a bird, insect, or bat that are used for flying.
A part of a building that projects from the main part.
A group within a larger organization, especially a political party, that represents a particular set of beliefs or policies.
The act or process of flying.
An area of a stage to the side of the acting area, out of sight of the audience.
examples: The new wing of the hospital is complete.
The left wing of the party gained influence.
The plane took wing at dawn.
The actor waited in the wings.
